constraints.warning: Changing the band changes what you can see. It does not change what the sun contains.

visible_spectrum.premise: The sun is too information-dense to stare at directly; the viewer exposes a configurable visible band.

sun_observation.hidden_mass_note: Unselected topics remain outside the current band; use the controls to move the instrument, not to pretend the rest is gone.
